title: Everything Serbium
description: A mod to help add more content and make the game fun. Includes new biomes, mobs, wood, ores, dimension, bosses
body:
A fun mod that introduces new mobs like the grandle, a rideable cow that is rare and can only be found in the beatroot biome, biomes like the funder a yellow forest with diverse life aswell as the beatroot a taller magenta forest with fewer wildlife, discs that can be found in dungeon chests, wood types like funder wood and beatroot wood, ores like serbium,githerium,bitherium, and albium, a new dimension called the monstreer and much more

Check Gallery For Crafting Recipes!

I will update the mod frequently (It is NOT discontinued)
